full_text:
Shadow Runner
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Shadow Runner. Cao Cao’s horse. A blood-sweating Fergana horse. Died at Wancheng. Shadow Runner may not have existed in history. Shadow Runner was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Shadow Runner lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
